summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BIBI Cars CRM system with auction parser functionality. Tested public site (homepage, vehicles catalog, VIN check) and admin CRM interface. Most features working correctly with 2 backend API issues identified.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 404 - VIN check functionality not implemented
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks public VIN check feature completely

minor_issues.issue: Returns 404 - health check endpoint not implemented

integration_issues.issue: VIN search shows 404 error due to missing backend endpoint

session_issues.issue: Session appears to expire quickly, requiring re-login

passed_tests: Public homepage loads with hero, stats, hot auctions, ending soon, upcoming sections
Vehicles catalog with filters (All, Hot, Ending, Upcoming) and search functionality
VIN check page UI and form validation (backend integration fails)
Admin login with correct credentials (admin@crm.com / admin123)
Admin dashboard displays CRM interface with navigation and stats

success_percentage.frontend: 85% (4/5 major flows working - VIN check integration fails)

action_item_for_main_agent: Implement missing VIN check backend endpoint (/api/vin/public/{vin}) to enable public VIN search functionality. Consider adding health check endpoint for monitoring. Review admin session management for potential timeout issues.
